gcode:
; Filament Change Macro (M600)
; vendor: example  model: generic  version: 1.0.0
;
; Pauses the print, parks the toolhead, and waits for the user to swap
; filament before resuming.  Requires the [pause_resume] section to be
; configured in printer.cfg.

[gcode_macro FILAMENT_CHANGE]
description: Pause print and wait for filament swap (M600)
gcode:
    {% set X = params.X | default(10) | float %}
    {% set Y = params.Y | default(10) | float %}
    {% set Z = params.Z | default(10) | float %}
    {% set E = params.E | default(100) | float %}

    SAVE_GCODE_STATE NAME=filament_change_state
    PAUSE
    G91
    G1 E-5 F3600           ; retract 5 mm to reduce ooze
    G1 Z{Z} F900           ; raise nozzle
    G90
    G1 X{X} Y{Y} F6000     ; park at purge bucket / front corner
    G91
    G1 E-{E} F300          ; unload filament
    G90
    M117 Load new filament, then resume
    RESTORE_GCODE_STATE NAME=filament_change_state MOVE=0

[gcode_macro M600]
description: Filament change (alias for FILAMENT_CHANGE)
gcode:
    FILAMENT_CHANGE {rawparams}
